description: Crafted from pure Italian leather and German techniques, woodland's footwear have become synonymous with artisanal styling. Rugged with a sophisticated finish, this shoe is a long-lasting investment in your off-duty ensembles. Wear this with chinos, a sweater and a crisp shirt.UpperTwo-tone leather upper with stitch detail on the seams of the toe boxFive-hole lace ups with metal eyeletsPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and tractionOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guardShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
